pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok dependency to a version compatible with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may fail to compile or process annotations correctly on JDK 21 due to internal API changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version that supports JDK 21 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugin versions may not recognize JDK 21 bytecode or features, causing build failures.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target configuration with the modern release flag for cross-compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Using source/target with JDK 21 can lead to mismatched class files or warnings; release is the standard for JDK 9+.
